samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Combine flour and margarine and add to egg mixture
Add milk and vanilla; beat well
Bake at 350 for 50 minutes or until knife comes out clean
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- eggs
- sugar
- flour
- margarine
- shell
- milk
- vanilla

Instructions:
1. Separate eggs
2. Beat yolks
3. Add sugar and beat well
4. Combine flour and margarine and add to egg mixture
5. Blend well
6. Add milk and vanilla; beat well
7. Pour into unbaked pie shell
8. Bake at 350 for 50 minutes or until knife comes out clean

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Sift flour, cocoa, baking powder, soda and salt
Pour into a 9 x 13-inch pan which has been greased
Turn out of oven and cool 10 minutes. <NEXT
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- butter
- sugar
- eggs
- vanilla
- flour
- cocoa
- soda
- baking powder
- salt

Instructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar
2. Add eggs and vanilla
3. Sift flour, cocoa, baking powder, soda and salt
4. Add to creamed mixture
5. Mix well
6. Pour into a 9 x 13-inch pan which has been greased
7. Bake at 350 for 25 minutes
8. Turn out of oven and cool 10 minutes. <NEXT

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Flatten chicken breasts and season with salt and pepper
Dip chicken in melted butter, then dredge in flour, then in flour
Fry chicken breasts in hot oil until done
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- Chicken
- Salt
- Butter
- Pepper

Instructions:
1. Flatten chicken breasts and season with salt and pepper
2. Dip chicken in melted butter, then dredge in flour, then in flour
3. Fry chicken breasts in hot oil until done
4. Serve with rice

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Place the chicken in an oblong pan
Sprinkle the onion, and black pepper on top
Spread the soup over the chicken
Spread the rice evenly over the chicken
Spread the soup mixture over this, and dot it with butter
Remove the foil from the pan
Remove the chicken, and set aside
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- chickens
- onion
- black pepper
- butter
- cream of mushroom soup

Instructions:
1. Place the chicken in an oblong pan
2. Sprinkle the onion, and black pepper on top
3. Spread the soup over the chicken
4. Spread the rice evenly over the chicken
5. Spread the soup mixture over this, and dot it with butter
6. Cover with aluminum foil
7. Bake at 350 for 1 hour
8. Remove the foil from the pan
9. Remove the chicken, and set aside

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Combine dry ingredients in large bowl
Roll out on board to 1/4 to 1/2-inch thickness
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- flour
- salt
- butter
- Crisco
- milk
- egg
- Worcestershire sauce

Instructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients in large bowl
2. Cut in Crisco
3. Stir in milk
4. Add egg to make batter
5. Spread on floured surface
6. Roll out on board to 1/4 to 1/2-inch thickness
7. Cut with biscuit cutter
8. Bake at 425 for 15 minutes
